story-context.title: Complete 10-Layer JWT Validation Integration
story-context.summary: Integrate all 10 JWT validation layers into JwtValidationFilter with fail-fast approach, comprehensive exception handling, and per-layer metrics. Validates <50ms total performance target.
story-context.key-code: - JwtValidationFilter.kt orchestrates all 10 layers sequentially - Comprehensive exception handling with @Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught") - Handles: JwtException, InjectionDetectedException, SecurityException, IllegalArgumentException - Fail-fast: First validation failure short-circuits (no wasted processing) - Metrics per layer: jwt_validation_duration_seconds{layer}
story-context.performance-target: - Total JWT validation: <50ms (target: <30ms) - Layer 1-6 (Spring Security): <20ms - Layer 7 (Redis): <5ms - Layer 8 (Role Normalization): <2ms - Layer 9 (User Validation, optional): <10ms - Layer 10 (Injection Detection): <3ms
story-context.testing: E2E integration test with all 10 layers, Comprehensive JWT variations, Performance assertions, Real infrastructure (Testcontainers Keycloak + Redis)
